summary: Implementation review accepts the validate-only preview-contact-form package, registry query, validator guard support, and no-submit boundary for Lode #177/#178/#179/#180.
reviewed_validation_summary: python3 -m py_compile tools/lode_validate_package.py; python3 tools/lode_validate_package.py --registry-index registry/local-packages.json --all --json; git diff --check; loom suite validate/evidence/carrier; loom fact-chain; loom verify passed locally before review artifact commit.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The implementation expresses write-precheck package facts without authorizing submit/publish/save/upload/schedule behavior or storing private runtime material.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: Validator and registry checks pass for the new package and existing packages; true-write execution remains blocked by active no-submit guard facts.
